title: ophrys passionis subsp. garganica
intro: Ophrys passionis subsp. garganica, also known as the Garganica Bee Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Ophrys passionis subsp. garganica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
